creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know that you can go into this iconic building that usually completely closed to the public? ad-pr This is the @royalhospitalchelsea, home to the famous Chelsea Pensioners and you can book a tour led by a resident pensioner! It’s fascinating to learn about the history, see the incredible spaces like the Great Hall and the Wren Chapel and get an insider’s perspective 😉 
🎟️ Public tickets for the full site tour are £30 for adults and £17.50 for children
🗓️ They run Tuesdays - Sundays

Over the summer, they also have the incredible @liveatchelsea which returns this June for 5 days, with a line up featuring something for everyone.
🗓️ 10 – 14th June
📍 Within the grounds of the iconic Royal Hospital Chelsea.
🎟️ Tickets on-sale now at LiveAtChelsea.com
@kilimanjaro.live

transcription.text: Did you know that you can go into this building which is usually completely closed to the public? This is the Royal Hospital Chelsea, home to the famous Chelsea Pensioners. Hundreds of British Army veterans and this historic institution has been around since the 1600s. You can now book onto tours of the building, buy a resident pensioner, learn about the incredible stories, visit the famous Wren Chapel as well as the Great Hall which is where the residents will eat their breakfast, lunch and dinner every day. Our tour guide Bill was amazing and it's so unique to get an insider's perspective. They also host summer concerts called Live at Chelsea within the iconic grounds. Find all the details in the caption.
